choices.name: NoNotemploymentreferencebutotheractivityhistory
choices.choiceText: Not employment reference but other activity history

value.stringValue: Not employment reference but other activity history

Flow.interviewLabel: Vetting and Compliance - Capita - Employment and Activity History {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Vetting and Compliance - Capita - Employment and Activity History

fields.name: Header_Text2
fields.fieldText: Activity History

fields.name: From
fields.fieldText: From

validationRule.errorMessage: From date must be before To date

fields.name: Totext
fields.fieldText: To: {!ToDate}

value.stringValue: Please choose from the below Activity Types

fields.name: Activty_other
fields.fieldText: Please provide the other reason below:

fields.name: Text
fields.fieldText:
Please Note

If claiming Job Seekers Allowance, please detail the Job Centre

fields.name: What_was_your_method_of_support_during_this_time
fields.fieldText: What was your method of support during this time?

fields.name: Employer
fields.fieldText: Name of company:

fields.name: Company_Address
fields.fieldText: Company Address:

fields.name: Reference_name
fields.fieldText: Referee Name:

fields.name: Reference_contact_number
fields.fieldText: Referee Contact Number:

fields.name: Reference_email_address
fields.fieldText: Referee Email Address:

fields.name: I_acknowledge_that_Get_Candidate_Brand_c_will_verify_the_contents_of_my_registra
fields.fieldText: I acknowledge that Blue Arrow will verify the contents of my vetting including asking referees to provide a reference and that this falls into legitimate business interest as defined by the Data Protection Act 2018.

fields.name: Header_Text
fields.fieldText: Activity History

fields.name: Success_Text
fields.fieldText:
✔

Status: Completed

Date: {!Get_Vetting_Document.Document_Completed_Date__c}

fields.name: trex3
fields.fieldText:
In order to be eligible for work we require a detailed activity history from yourself since leaving school. This will include any periods in which you have been absent from employment including un-employment, higher education etc. Any employment references given in the last 3 years will also need extra details


School Leaving Date: {!SchoolDate}

fields.name: vdxczxvc
fields.fieldText: Outstanding Days: {!DaysToComplete}

fields.name: Prior_text_to_activity_history
fields.fieldText: You will now be required to complete your activity history starting with your most recent employer and working back to your school leaving age.

fields.name: Header_Text_0
fields.fieldText: Activity History

fields.name: trex3_0
fields.fieldText:
In order to be eligible for work we require a detailed activity history from yourself since leaving school. This will include any periods in which you have been absent from employment including un-employment, higher education etc.


We will be applying for employment referencing covering the last 3 years therefore we will require additional information to obtain these.

fields.name: School_Leaving_Date
fields.fieldText: School Leaving Date

fields.name: OutsideUK
fields.fieldText: Have you been outside of the UK for 6 months or more in the last 5 years?

fields.name: FromOutside
fields.fieldText: From

fields.name: ToOutside
fields.fieldText: To

fields.name: Country
fields.fieldText: Country

fields.name: DT1
fields.fieldText: Employment and Activity History

fields.name: DT2
fields.fieldText:
Example response

  1. Put it in a Box Ltd, Dead-End Road, AA1 2BB.
  2. Packer
  3. Fred Fuller Line Manager
  4. HR@putitinabox.com 01234 567 890
  5. Time for a change

fields.name: First_and_Second_Personal_reference_header
fields.fieldText: As a minimum you are required to provide us with at least 1 years of employment references/activity history and up to a maximum of 6 years, dependant on the Capita campaign you are working on. If you are unsure how many years you are to provide, please list up to 6 years to ensure you're covered for all eventualities.

fields.name: Thinking_back_to_the_previous_6_years_were_you_in_employment_at_any_point
fields.fieldText: Thinking back to the previous 6 years, were you in employment at any point?

fields.name: Employment_Reference_1_Company_details
fields.fieldText: Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

fields.name: X1_The_name_and_full_postal_address_of_your_employer
fields.fieldText: 1. The name and full postal address of your employer

fields.name: Employment_Reference_1_Company_details_0
fields.fieldText: Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

fields.name: X2_Your_job_title_and_department
fields.fieldText: 2. Your job title and department

fields.name: Employment_Reference_1_Company_details_1
fields.fieldText: Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

fields.name: X3_Your_referee_name_and_job_title
fields.fieldText: 3. Your referee name and job title

fields.name: Employment_Reference_1_Company_details_2
fields.fieldText: Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

fields.name: X4_Referee_s_contact_email_and_telephone_number
fields.fieldText: 4. Referees contact email and telephone number

fields.name: Employment_Reference_1_Company_details_3
fields.fieldText: Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

fields.name: X5_Reason_for_leaving
fields.fieldText: 5. Reason for leaving

fields.name: Employment_Reference_1_Company_details_4
fields.fieldText: Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the start date (approx. date is fine)

fields.name: Employment_Reference_1_Start_date
fields.fieldText: Start Date

fields.name: Employment_Reference_1_Company_details_5
fields.fieldText: Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the end date (approx. date is fine)

fields.name: Employment_Reference_1_End_date
fields.fieldText: End Date

fields.name: Does_Employment_Reference_1_provided_cover_at_least_the_last_1_year_of_activity
fields.fieldText: Does Employment Reference 1 provided cover at least the last 1 year of activity?

fields.name: Were_you_in_education_at_any_point_in_the_last_6_years
fields.fieldText: Were you in education at any point in the last 6 years?

fields.name: Does_any_other_activities_listed_below_cover_any_gaps_of_28_days_or_more
fields.fieldText:
Does any other activities listed below cover any gaps of 28 days or more in the last 6 years from what you have already provided us above?


Maternity/Paternity,

Carer,

Army,

Volunteering,

Unemployed/Jobseeking

fields.name: Does_any_other_activities_listed
fields.fieldText: Please answer YES/NO:

fields.name: Further_Activity_Details
fields.fieldText: Please provide further details of your other activities along with dates to and from using the free text box below with as much contact information and explanation as possible.

fields.name: Otheranswer
fields.fieldText: Please provide the information below:

textTemplates.name: DocumentTextFinal
textTemplates.text:
Employment and Activity History


Example response

  1. Put it in a Box Ltd, Dead-End Road, AA1 2BB.
  2. Packer
  3. Fred Fuller Line Manager
  4. HR@putitinabox.com 01234 567 890
  5. Time for a change

As a minimum you are required to provide us with at least 1 years of employment references/activity history and up to a maximum of 6 years, dependent on the Capita campaign you are working on. If you are unsure how many years you are to provide, please list up to 6 years to ensure you're covered for all eventualities.


Thinking back to the previous 6 years, were you in employment at any point?

{!Thinking_back_to_the_previous_6_years_were_you_in_employment_at_any_point}


Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

1. The name and full postal address of your employer

{!X1_The_name_and_full_postal_address_of_your_employer}


Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

2. Your job title and department

{!X2_Your_job_title_and_department}


Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

3. Your referee name and job title

{!X3_Your_referee_name_and_job_title}


Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

4. Referee's contact email and telephone number

{!X4_Referee_s_contact_email_and_telephone_number}


Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the following details

5. Reason for leaving

{!X5_Reason_for_leaving}


Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the start date (approx. date is fine)

Start Date

{!Employment_Reference_1_Start_date}


Employment Reference 1 Company details - please provide the end date (approx. date is fine)

End Date

{!Employment_Reference_1_End_date}


Does Employment Reference 1 provided cover at least the last 1 year of activity?

{!Does_Employment_Reference_1_provided_cover_at_least_the_last_1_year_of_activity}


Do you have further employment reference information to provide?

{!Do_you_have_further_employment_reference_information_to_provide}



Employment Reference 2 Company details - please provide the following details

1. The name and full postal address of your employer

{!X2_The_name_and_full_postal_address_of_your_employer}


Employment Reference 2 Company details - please provide the following details

2. Your job title and department

{!Y2_Your_job_title_and_department}


Employment Reference 2 Company details - please provide the following details

3. Your referee name and job title

{!Y3_Your_referee_name_and_job_title}


Employment Reference 2 Company details - please provide the following details

4. Referee's contact email and telephone number

{!Y4_Referee_s_contact_email_and_telephone_number}


Employment Reference 2 Company details - please provide the following details

5. Reason for leaving

{!Y5_Reason_for_leaving}


Employment Reference 2 Company details - please provide the start date (approx. date is fine)

Start Date

{!Employment_Reference_2_Start_date}


Employment Reference 2 Company details - please provide the end date (approx. date is fine)

End Date

{!Employment_Reference_2_End_date}


Do you have further employment reference information to provide?

{!Do_you_have_further_employment_reference_information_to_provide2}


Employment Reference 3 Company details - please provide the following details

1. The name and full postal address of your employer

{!X3_The_name_and_full_postal_address_of_your_employer}


Employment Reference 3 Company details - please provide the following details

2. Your job title and department

{!Z2_Your_job_title_and_department}


Employment Reference 3 Company details - please provide the following details

3. Your referee name and job title

{!Z3_Your_referee_name_and_job_title}


Employment Reference 3 Company details - please provide the following details

4. Referee's contact email and telephone number

{!Z4_Referee_s_contact_email_and_telephone_number}


Employment Reference 3 Company details - please provide the following details

5. Reason for leaving

{!Z5_Reason_for_leaving}


Employment Reference 3 Company details - please provide the start date (approx. date is fine)

{!Employment_Reference_3_Start_date}


Employment Reference 3 Company details - please provide the end date (approx. date is fine)

{!Employment_Reference_3_End_date}


Do you have further employment reference information to provide?

{!Do_you_have_further_employment_reference_information_to_provide3}


Employment Reference 4 Company details - please provide the following details

1. The name and full postal address of your employer

{!X4_The_name_and_full_postal_address_of_your_employer}


Employment Reference 4 Company details - please provide the following details

2. Your job title and department

{!A2_Your_job_title_and_department}


Employment Reference 4 Company details - please provide the following details

3. Your referee name and job title

{!A3_Your_referee_name_and_job_title}


Employment Reference 4 Company details - please provide the following details

4. Referee's contact email and telephone number

{!A4_Referee_s_contact_email_and_telephone_number}


Employment Reference 4 Company details - please provide the following details

5. Reason for leaving

{!A5_Reason_for_leaving}


Employment Reference 4 Company details - please provide the start date (approx. date is fine)

Start Date

{!Employment_Reference_4_Start_date}


Employment Reference 4 Company details - please provide the end date (approx. date is fine)

End Date

{!Employment_Reference_4_End_date}


Do you have further employment reference information to provide?

{!Do_you_have_further_employment_reference_information_to_provide4}


Employment Reference 5 Company details - please provide the following details

1. The name and full postal address of your employer

{!X5_The_name_and_full_postal_address_of_your_employer}


Employment Reference 5 Company details - please provide the following details

2. Your job title and department

{!B2_Your_job_title_and_department}


﻿Employment Reference 5 Company details - please provide the following details

3. Your referee name and job title

{!B3_Your_referee_name_and_job_title}


Employment Reference 5 Company details - please provide the following details

4. Referee's contact email and telephone number

{!B4_Referee_s_contact_email_and_telephone_number}


Employment Reference 5 Company details - please provide the following details

5. Reason for leaving

{!B5_Reason_for_leaving}


Employment Reference 5 Company details - please provide the start date (approx. date is fine)

Start Date

{!Employment_Reference_5_Start_date}


Employment Reference 5 Company details - please provide the end date (approx. date is fine)

End Date

{!Employment_Reference_5_End_date}



Were you in education at any point in the last 6 years?

{!Were_you_in_education_at_any_point_in_the_last_6_years}


Does any other activities listed below cover any gaps of 28 days or more in the last 6 years from what you've already provided us above?


Maternity/Paternity,

Carer,

Army,

Volunteering,

Unemployed/Jobseeking


Please answer YES/NO for the above:

{!Does_any_other_activities_listed}


Please provide further details of your other activities along with dates to and from using the free text box below with as much contact information and explanation as possible.

{!Otheranswer}





Status: Completed

Completed Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}



﻿Confirmed By: {!Get_Candidate.Name}

Confirmed Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDate}

textTemplates.name: DocumentTextHalf
textTemplates.text:
Activity History

School Leaving Date: {!School_Leaving_Date}

Have you been outside of the UK for 6 months or more in the last 5 years?

{!OutsideUK}

From: {!FromOutside}

To: {!ToOutside}

Country: {!Country}

textTemplates.name: SupportingTextEmployed
textTemplates.text:
Activity Type: {!Activity_Type.value}

Name of Company: {!Employer}

﻿Company Address:

{!Company_Address}

Reference Name: {!Reference_name}

Reference Contact Number: {!Reference_contact_number}

Reference Email Address: {!Reference_email_address}

Permission to contact: Yes

From: {!From}

To: {!ToDate}

textTemplates.name: SupportingTextOther
textTemplates.text:
Activity Type: {!Activity_Type.value}

Method of Support:

{!What_was_your_method_of_support_during_this_time}

From: {!From}

To: {!ToDate}
